title: Signals Across the Salt Plain
originalityStatement: An original exploration benchmark about weather instruments and a salt plain, with no borrowed world, landmarks, or mechanics.

storyModel.premise: A field engineer follows visible storm instruments across an open salt plain and learns to redirect local windbreaks before a rescue convoy arrives.
storyModel.playerRole: Field engineer carrying a configurable survey kit
protectedCanon: The engineer cannot prevent the storm, only make safe passages

productProfile.spatialBudget: one open map with six landmark zones
